title: SQLite
text: SQLite SQLite (SLE) is the default database provided for the Uniface Repository and is appropriate for single-user use. It is not recommended for a shared Uniface Repository. CAUTION: Version 2.0 and higher of the SLE connector cannot use databases created by the SLE U1.0 connector, they are incompatible. If you want to move from using SLE U1.0 to a higher version of the SLE connector, you will need to export all the data from these databases using the SLE U1.0 connector, and import this data into a new database created by version 2.0 (SLE U2.0) or higher of the SLE connector. Connector Attribute/Feature Description Mnemonic SLE Supported Version For the supported platforms and product versions, see the Platform Availability Matrix . Supported utilities Create Table and Load Definitions are supported. SQL support Yes Stored procedures support No Database encoding UTF-8 Related Links DBMS Connector Overview This section provides an overview of supported functionality and limitations for all DBMS connectors. Load Definitions Facility for SQLite The Load Definitions functionality is supported for SQLite. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
